IntegrationBoundaryPlan.Summary: 84 outbound and 7 inbound integration links detected; 3 anti-corruption requirement(s) inferred.

Phases.Name: Stabilize Service Boundary
Phases.Objective: Freeze and validate contracts for Price before extraction.
WorkItems: Validate endpoint ownership and route coverage.
Capture baseline integration and dependency tests.
Introduce feature flags for traffic redirection.
ExitCriteria: Contract tests are green for public/admin/internal endpoints.
Phases.RollbackStrategy: Disable route switch and keep all traffic in monolith.

Phases.Name: Read Path Extraction
Phases.Objective: Move read-only APIs first to reduce data-write risk.
WorkItems: Route read traffic through service facade.
Keep writes in monolith and validate parity.
ExitCriteria: Read API parity and latency targets are met.
Phases.RollbackStrategy: Redirect read traffic back to monolith handlers.

Phases.Name: Write Path and Data Transition
Phases.Objective: Transition writes with controlled shared database period.
WorkItems: Migrate command/write handlers and validation logic.
Introduce ownership-aware access control for shared tables.
Enable anti-corruption APIs for legacy/shared dependencies.
Phases.RollbackStrategy: Switch write route and job dispatch back to monolith path.

Phases.Name: Background Jobs and Monolith Decommission
Phases.Objective: Migrate legacy-hosted jobs and remove monolith runtime dependency.
WorkItems: Move compatible jobs to service host with new scheduling bootstrap.
Keep legacy-hosted jobs in monolith until config/runtime refactor is complete.
Delete dead code paths and redundant adapters.
ExitCriteria: No production traffic executes in extracted monolith modules.
Runbook and SLO ownership transferred to service team.
Phases.RollbackStrategy: N/A after monolith code path decommission.
